dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: Targeted runs of `tests/integration/test-sandbox-guard.sh`, `test-install-consumer-mode.sh`, and `test-upgrade-migration.sh` passed, but AC-5 is still unmet because `tests/integration/test-sandbox-guard.sh` only mutates `$TMP/fake-repo` and never points `FURROW_ROOT` at the real repo root as required.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: The new sandbox library paths are exercised by `tests/integration/test-sandbox-guard.sh`, and the adopted install/upgrade flows were verified by successful runs of `tests/integration/test-install-consumer-mode.sh` and `tests/integration/test-upgrade-migration.sh`.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: `docs/architecture/testing.md` tells tests to invoke `"$PROJECT_ROOT/bin/frw"`, and `bin/frw` immediately resets `FURROW_ROOT` from its own script path, so harness code paths still resolve to the live checkout, violating the AC-1 contract that no code path may do so.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: The diff is limited to sandbox/test harness files and the requested testing architecture doc (`docs/architecture/testing.md`, `tests/integration/*`), with no unrelated product or runtime code changes.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: `shellcheck` on the changed shell files reports warnings in modified code, including `SC2154` at `tests/integration/test-sandbox-guard.sh:64` and `SC2034` at `tests/integration/test-install-source-mode.sh:85`.
